title: Pollen tried to remove my article and Google is assisting with it
summary: This article discusses an incident where the AI startup Pollen attempted to remove a critical article about its founder, Callum Negus-Fancey, and alleges that Google is assisting in this censorship effort. The content focuses on platform power dynamics, content moderation, and potential abuse of AI-related corporate influence, rather than technical AI/ML details.
